utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check the final property solution: it includes all 6 keys. Next, verify each is fully specified according to what should be covered under each item with all details. - property: includes selected property with details (address, listing_price, bedrooms, key_features). Price present. Satisfies. - financing: includes a financing solution with terms (solution type, LTV, amount, arrangement fee, example interest rate with term, typical term). Satisfies. - legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package, cost). Satisfies. - moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (package, cost). Satisfies. - setup_services: includes utility and setup services (type and cost). Satisfies. - total_budget: includes a complete cost breakdown (lists property price, fees, survey cost, moving, utility, and totals). Satisfies. Therefore, all 6 items are included and sufficiently detailed.
